investigator.value: Ashton, a 20-year-old private investigator specializing in murders, going on vacation to Ireland
investigator.quote: Her work, private investigator, was mostly sitting in her cubicle, looking through endless piles of evidence

social_world.value: Private investigator workplace hierarchy with division head promotion potential
social_world.quote: her boss had hinted on becoming head of the division

investigator_wound.value: Inability to disconnect from work even during vacation
investigator_wound.quote: It seemed to her that she couldn't forget about it, even on her vacation
